requirements.text: Play a relay game with your den. Share with your Tiger adult partner or your den why you like this game.

requirements.heading: Requirement 3
requirements.text: Discuss what it means to be a good sport in a game with your Tiger adult partner or other Tigers.

requirements.heading: Requirement 4
requirements.text: Attend a sporting event.

requirements.heading: Requirement 1
requirements.text: Learn about the swimming safety rules that you need to follow.

requirements.heading: Requirement 2
requirements.text: Demonstrate how to enter the swimming area properly.

requirements.heading: Requirement 3
requirements.text: With your Tiger adult partner as your buddy, be active in water depths matching your ability for 20 minutes.

requirements.heading: Requirement 4
requirements.text: Place your face in the water and blow bubbles.

requirements.heading: Requirement 5
requirements.text: Demonstrate a flutter kick.

requirements.heading: Requirement 6
requirements.text: Demonstrate how to exit the swimming area properly.

requirements.heading: Requirement 1
requirements.text: Identify the Cub Scout Six Essentials. Show what you do with each item.

requirements.heading: Requirement 2
requirements.text: With your den leader or Tiger adult partner, learn about the Outdoor Code.

requirements.heading: Requirement 3
requirements.text: With your den, pack, or family, take a walk outside spending for at least 20 minutes exploring the outdoors with your Cub Scout Six Essentials. While outside, identify things that you see with your Tiger adult partner that are natural and things that are manmade.

requirements.heading: Requirement 4
requirements.text: Identify common animals that are found where you live. Learn which of those animals is domesticated and which animal is wild. Draw a picture of your favorite animal.

requirements.heading: Requirement 5
requirements.text: Look for a tree where you live. Describe how this tree is helpful.

requirements.heading: Requirement 1
requirements.text: With permission from your parent or legal guardian watch the Protect Yourself Rules video for the Tiger rank.

requirements.heading: Requirement 2
requirements.text: With your Tiger adult partner, demonstrate Shout, Run, Tell as explained in the Protect Yourself Rules video.

requirements.heading: Requirement 3
requirements.text: With your Tiger adult partner, demonstrate how to access emergency services.

requirements.heading: Requirement 4
requirements.text: With your Tiger adult partner, demonstrate that you know what to do if you get lost or separated .

requirements.heading: Requirement 1
requirements.text: Learn about the swimming safety rules that you need to follow.

requirements.heading: Requirement 2
requirements.text: Demonstrate how to enter the swimming area properly.

requirements.heading: Requirement 3
requirements.text: With your Lion adult partner as your buddy, be active in water depths matching your ability for 20 minutes.

requirements.heading: Requirement 4
requirements.text: Place your face in the water and blow bubbles.

requirements.heading: Requirement 5
requirements.text: Demonstrate how to exit the swimming area properly.

requirements.heading: Requirement 1
requirements.text: Prepare for a 2-mile walk outside. Gather your Cub Scout Six Essentials and weather appropriate clothing and shoes.

requirements.heading: Requirement 2
requirements.text: Plan a 2-mile route for your walk.

requirements.heading: Requirement 3
requirements.text: Check the weather forecast for the time of your planned 2-mile walk.

requirements.heading: Requirement 4
requirements.text: Review the four points of Scouting America SAFE Checklist and how you will apply them on your 2-mile walk.

requirements.heading: Requirement 5
requirements.text: Demonstrate first aid for each of the following events that could occur on your 2-mile walk: blister, sprained ankle, sunburn, dehydration and heat related illness.

requirements.heading: Requirement 6
requirements.text: With your den, pack, or family, go on your 2-mile walk while practicing the Leave No Trace Principles for Kids and Outdoor Code.

requirements.heading: Requirement 7
requirements.text: After your 2-mile walk, discuss with your den what went well and what you would do differently next time.

requirements.heading: Requirement 1
requirements.text: Read, understand, and promise to abide by the “Cub Scout Knife Safety Rules.”

requirements.heading: Requirement 2
requirements.text: Demonstrate the knife safety circle.

requirements.heading: Requirement 3
requirements.text: Demonstrate that you know how to care for and use your pocketknife safely.

requirements.heading: Requirement 4
requirements.text: Make two carvings with a pocketknife.

requirements.heading: Requirement 1
requirements.text: Learn the safety rules of using a yo-yo and always follow them.

requirements.heading: Requirement 2
requirements.text: Discover how to find the proper yo-yo string length for you.

requirements.heading: Requirement 3
requirements.text: Explain why it is important to have the correct string length and to be in the right location before throwing a yo-yo.

requirements.heading: Requirement 4
requirements.text: Demonstrate how to properly string a yo-yo and how to create a slip knot.

requirements.heading: Requirement 5
requirements.text: Conduct the pendulum experiment with a yo-yo. Explain what happens to the yo-yo when the string is longer.

requirements.heading: Requirement 6
requirements.text: Show that you can properly wind a yo-yo.

requirements.heading: Requirement 7
requirements.text: Attempt each of the following: gravity pull, sleeper, breakaway.
